title: Carbon Footprint Calculator - Estimate Your CO2 Emissions
description: Free carbon footprint calculator. Estimate your annual CO2 emissions from transportation, home energy, and lifestyle choices.
keywords: carbon footprint calculator, CO2 calculator, carbon emissions, environmental impact calculator, greenhouse gas
intro: Estimate your annual carbon footprint. Enter your transportation, energy, and lifestyle details to see your CO2 emissions.

faq.a: A carbon footprint is the total amount of greenhouse gases (measured in CO2 equivalent) produced by your activities, typically measured annually.

faq.q: What is the average carbon footprint?
faq.a: The average American has a carbon footprint of about 16 tons CO2/year. The global average is about 4 tons. The target for climate goals is under 2 tons.

faq.q: How can I reduce my carbon footprint?
faq.a: Drive less or switch to EV, reduce air travel, improve home insulation, eat less meat, and use renewable energy.
